results.name: Bangladesh
results.key_finding: Exited ITUC 2026 10-worst workers'-rights list on substantive, verified November 2025 labour reforms (eased union formation, anti-discrimination, ILO C155/C187/C190); upgrade stays in Developing band given retained Rating 5 and SEZ exclusion.

results.name: SpaceX AI
results.key_finding: Not in published ai-labs index; Grok whistleblower lawsuit (Devin Kim, filed Jun 9-10) is pre-adjudication allegation against co-founder Jimmy Ba. SpaceX IPO is not compassion-relevant. Flag for possible index addition; no delta proposal possible.

results.name: Amazon
results.key_finding: Adjudicated NLRB finding (Jun 2026, illegal firing of SF union organizer) plus Feb 2026 EEOC pregnancy-discrimination finding reinforce the existing critical floor; no improvement evidence.

results.name: Apple
results.key_finding: Towson unionized-store closure ULP is pre-adjudication (charge filed, not ruled); single in-window negative thread does not move an otherwise stable Functional profile.

results.name: OpenAI
results.key_finding: 42-state AG subpoena (Jun 12) and MDL-3047 bellwether trial are pre-adjudication; investigation and allegations, not findings. Consistent with published 27.5.

results.name: Bolivia
results.key_finding: Ongoing unrest (10 dead, 7 from denied medical access, military-deployment law, continuing blockades) matches the conditions that set 6.3; no genuinely new in-window escalation beyond baseline.

results.name: Ukraine
results.key_finding: Jun 15 Kyiv strike (5 killed, Lavra roof set alight) is harm inflicted BY Russia; victim attribution means it does not lower Ukraine's own compassion score.

results.name: Pakistan
results.key_finding: HRW Jun 12 forced-eviction report (Islamabad informal settlements, no compensation, defying Supreme Court stay) strongly confirms the existing critical score; even a modeled downgrade stays within -2.7 and the Critical band.

results.name: Nigeria
results.key_finding: 34.7M at acute food insecurity (lean-season peak, 15,000 IPC Phase 5 in Borno) is an ongoing humanitarian crisis already reflected; no new acute escalation in-window.

results.name: China
results.key_finding: Ongoing Uyghur detention/forced-labour conditions (UN experts Jan 2026) consistent with the existing critical score; no new in-window escalation.

results.name: Mexico
results.key_finding: Deportee reception and cartel-violence concerns are HRW world-report-level ongoing conditions; no fresh in-window escalation to move the score.

results.name: Colombia
results.key_finding: Displacement/migration/armed-violence intersection is ongoing context; no in-window escalation beyond the published baseline.

results.name: Zimbabwe
results.key_finding: The Patriotic Act court ruling cited by the scanner is dated June 2025 (out of the 2026 freshness window) and cannot drive a score change; ongoing crackdown consistent with published score.

results.name: Central African Republic
results.key_finding: Refugee overflow into Chad reflects ongoing displacement already captured by the near-floor published score; no new in-window escalation.

results.name: Democratic Republic of Congo
results.key_finding: Bundibugyo Ebola PHEIC (782 cases/181 deaths as of Jun 14) is met by an active WHO/Africa CDC-led international response and US$220M pledge; the response is a mild positive that does not move an entity already at the 2.3 floor.

results.name: World Fuel Services
results.key_finding: Rotation backfill; no material in-window compassion-relevant evidence found. Placeholder uniform 2.0 profile retained pending a full assessment.

results.name: DXC Technology
results.key_finding: Rotation backfill; no material in-window compassion-relevant evidence found. Placeholder uniform 2.0 profile retained pending a full assessment.

results.name: Superior Industries
results.key_finding: Rotation backfill; no material in-window compassion-relevant evidence found. Placeholder uniform 2.0 profile retained pending a full assessment.

results.name: Veritiv
results.key_finding: Rotation backfill; no material in-window compassion-relevant evidence found. Placeholder uniform 2.0 profile retained pending a full assessment.

results.name: Tech Data
results.key_finding: Rotation backfill; no material in-window compassion-relevant evidence found. Placeholder uniform 2.0 profile retained pending a full assessment.

errors.issue: Entity not present in published ai-labs index; cannot compute a composite delta. Recommend flag-for-review for potential index addition once xAI/SpaceX-AI is benchmarked. Whistleblower lawsuit is pre-adjudication and does not by itself establish a score.
